name: Pagaya Technologies Ltd.
summary: PART I History and Development of the Company Pagaya Technologies Ltd. was incorporated on March 20, 2016 and is organized under the laws of the State of Israel. We are registered with the Israeli Registrar of Companies, registration number 51-542127-9. In February 2024, Pagaya relocated its corporate headquarters to its current New York City office. The U.S. is where we conduct our business, generate the majority of our revenue, and where all of our Partners and SFR Partners are domiciled. The ...
